name: Peanut Butter Pie (Finsand)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine water, peanut butter, and baking chocolate in the top of a double boiler.
2. Cook and stir over simmering water until the peanut butter and chocolate are melted.
3. Stir in sorbitol and granulated sugar replacement.
4. In a bowl, blend milk, flour, and cornstarch together until smooth.
5. Gradually pour a small amount of chocolate mixture into the milk mixture.
6. Cook and stir for 2 minutes longer.
7. Remove from heat; stir in vanilla extract.
8. Cool and stir for 2 minutes longer.
9. Pour into baked pie shell.
10. Chill in refrigerator until set, at least 2 hours.
Food exchange per serving: 1 HIGH-FAT MEAT EXCHANGE + 1 FAT EXCHANGE + 1/2 FRUIT EXCHANGE + PIECRUST EXCHANGE
Source: The Diabetic Chocalate Cookbook by Mary Jane Finsand
Brought to you and yours via Nancy O'Brion and her Meal-Master
